title: Nartiang Durga Temple
tagline: Nartiang Durga Temple — spiritual town of Meghalaya

overview.short: Nartiang Durga Temple is a Hindu temple located in the West Jaintia Hills district of Meghalaya in northeastern India.
overview.description: Nartiang Durga Temple is a Hindu temple located in the West Jaintia Hills district of Meghalaya in northeastern India. It is one of the 51 Shakta pithas and is one of the holiest sites for devotees of the Shaktism sect of Hinduism. It is 600 years old. The Hindus in the Jaintia Hills believe that this temple is the permanent abode of Goddess Durga.

topPlaces.name: 2018 Meghalaya mining accident
topPlaces.description: The Meghalaya mining accident happened on 13 December 2018, when 15 miners were trapped in a mine in Ksan, in the Indian state of Meghalaya. While five miners managed to escape, rescue efforts for the remaining 10 continued till 2 March 2019.

topPlaces.name: North Karbi-Anglong Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: North Karbi-Anglong Wildlife Sanctuary is a proposed protected area and wildlife sanctuary located in the Karbi Anglong district of the Indian state of Assam.

topPlaces.name: Thadlaskein Lake
topPlaces.description: Thadlaskein Lake, also Pung Sajar Nangli, is a man-made historical lake in Meghalaya, India. It is on National Highway 6 next to a small village called Mukhla.

topPlaces.name: Bormarjong
topPlaces.description: Bormarjong is a village in the West Karbi Anglong district of Assam State in North East India. It falls under the Amri Development Block and Vidhan Sabha No.

items.note: The Meghalaya mining accident happened on 13 December 2018, when 15 miners were trapped in a mine in Ksan, in the Indian state of Meghalaya. While five miners managed to escape, rescue efforts for the remaining 10 continued till 2 March 2019.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nartiang Durga Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nartiang Durga Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nartiang Durga Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shillong Airport (Umroi) (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nartiang Durga Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nartiang Durga Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nartiang Durga Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nartiang Durga Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nartiang Durga Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are 2018 Meghalaya mining accident, North Karbi-Anglong Wildlife Sanctuary, Thadlaskein Lake, Bormarjong.
